CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-22-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-16-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-22-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-03-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PARAGRAPH 4 OF THE DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER THE PARTIES ENTERED INTO A CREDIT CARD AGREEMENT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-11-2013 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was uncontested. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Paragraph 4 of the declaration of defendant creates a triable issue of material fact regarding whether the parties entered into a credit card agreement. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2013 Continued To Sep-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LAURA D' ANNA OF BLEIER & COX, TEL. NO. (818) 748-8100 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 3, 2013. MS. D'ANNA TO GIVE NOTICE TO THE DEFENDANT AND TO LODGE COURTESY COPIES OF PAPERS OF WHAT WAS FILED WITH THE COURT BUT WITH NO NEW PAPERS ON IT. THE TRIAL DATE STAYS WHICH IS SEPTEMBER 16, 2013.
